Tests the behavior of the Math.pow function with a base of 5 and an exponent of Infinity.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that uses an assertion to verify the behavior of the `Math.pow` function in JavaScript. It checks that raising the number 5 to the power of `Infinity` results in `Infinity`, which is consistent with mathematical principles. The script uses the `assert` function to ensure that the expression evaluates to `true`, and if not, it will throw an error. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific mathematical operation and its expected outcome.
